Title: Senior Java Fuse/ESB Developer Location: Jackson, MS (Onsite) Duration: 3 years Position type: Contract Job Description: We are currently seeking a Senior Fuse Developer with a strong Java background to join our team. The successful candidate should have a strong track record in ESB system planning, design and integration using JBoss Fuse, Java/J2EE, and Spring/Hibernate Should be very strong in ESB SOA orchestration, prioritization, que management, and API's using Java, JEE
